img.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; background: white;
width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; background: white;

div.class: mcp-session-item d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between p-2 rounded mb-1

img.style: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; background: white; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;

div.style: width: 32px; height: 32px; font-size: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

div.h1: How can I help you today?
div.p: Select an specialized agent to start a new Odoo conversation.

img.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; background: white;

i.class: fa fa-bolt fa-3x mb-3 text-primary opacity-25

div.class: mcp-suggestions-grid mt-3 d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 justify-content-center

button.data-text: Scan Odoo for active database tools

div.class: mcp-execution-gate-card border rounded p-3 mb-2 shadow-sm

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark border p-2 d-flex align-items-center gap-1

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-primary mcp-suggestion-chip px-3 text-white
button.style: background-color: var(--mcp-primary, #714B67) !important; border-color: var(--mcp-primary, #714B67) !important; color: white !important;

div.class: alert alert-light py-2 px-3 small mt-1 mb-0 border

i.t-attf-class: fa {{ message.structuredData.mimetype === 'application/pdf' ? 'fa-file-pdf-o text-danger' : 'fa-file-word-o text-primary' }} fa-2x me-3

div.class: alert alert-light py-1 px-2 small mt-1 mb-0 border

t.t-if: ft and ft.type === 'binary' and typeof row[col] === 'string' and row[col].startsWith('/')
ft and ft.type === 'binary' and typeof entry[1] === 'string' and entry[1].startsWith('/')

t.t-out: this._formatCellValue(entry[1], entry[0] === 'id' ? { relation: message.structuredData.model } : ft, message.structuredData.record)

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark border me-1 mb-1
